seo.title: Building Content Generation with AG2 + Vex Guardrails
seo.description: Learn how to build content generation with AG2 + Vex guardrails. Detect failures, prevent drift, and ensure reliability.

content.intro: Building content generation workflows with AG2 enables multi-agent collaboration for LLM-powered article creation, where agents handle research, drafting, editing, and fact-checking. Guardrails are essential to prevent off-topic drifts, factual errors, and brand voice violations that could damage credibility or SEO performance. Vex integration provides real-time verification for brand consistency, accuracy, and guidelines adherence.

architectureOverview.heading: Content Generation Architecture with AG2
architectureOverview.description:
The typical AG2 content generation setup involves a Researcher agent that gathers facts and sources, a Writer agent that drafts content in the brand voice, an Editor agent that enforces tone and structure, and a Fact-Checker agent that validates claims. These agents participate in a group chat orchestrated by AG2's enhanced group chat manager, with speaker selection and termination conditions to maintain focus. Vex hooks intercept messages for verification against brand guidelines, fact databases, and SEO rules before content advances.

The workflow starts with a topic input to the group chat. Agents collaborate iteratively: Researcher provides sources, Writer generates drafts, Editor refines for tone/SEO, and Fact-Checker cross-references claims. Final output is a polished article only after all verifications pass, ensuring production-ready content.

AG2's message hooks allow Vex to validate at key points: post-research facts, draft brand adherence, edit originality, and final factual accuracy.
architectureOverview.diagram:
┌─────────────────┐    ┌──────────────────┐
│   User Topic    │───▶│ AG2 Group Chat   │
│     Input       │    │  (4 Agents)      │
└─────────────────┘    │ Researcher ─────▶│
                      │    Writer ───────▶│ Vex Hooks
                      │    Editor ───────▶│  ├── Brand Voice
                      │  Fact-Checker ◀───│  ├── Fact Check
                      └──────────────────┘  ├── SEO/Tone
                                            │  └── Originality
                                            └───────────────▶ Final Article

risks.name: Brand Voice Drift
risks.description: Writer agent generates content deviating from specified brand tone/personality
risks.mitigation: Vex brand consistency checks on all draft messages

risks.name: Factual Inaccuracies
risks.description: Fact-Checker or Researcher propagates incorrect information from unreliable sources
risks.mitigation: Real-time fact verification against trusted databases via Vex

risks.name: Off-Topic Spiraling
risks.description: Group chat conversation drifts from core topic during multi-turn collaboration
risks.mitigation: Vex topic relevance scoring with conversation reset triggers

risks.name: SEO Non-Compliance
risks.description: Generated content fails keyword density, structure, or readability guidelines
risks.mitigation: Vex SEO compliance verification before editorial approval

implementation.title: Setup AG2 Content Generation Group
implementation.description: Initialize AG2 group chat with specialized content agents and Vex message hooks
implementation.code:
from ag2 import GroupChat, GroupChatManager
from ag2.agent import AssistantAgent
import vex

# Initialize Vex client
vex_client = vex.Client(api_key="your-vex-key")

# Define content agents
researcher = AssistantAgent(name="Researcher", llm_config={"model": "gpt-4"})
writer = AssistantAgent(name="Writer", llm_config={"model": "gpt-4"})
editor = AssistantAgent(name="Editor", llm_config={"model": "gpt-4"})
fact_checker = AssistantAgent(name="FactChecker", llm_config={"model": "gpt-4"})

# Create group chat
groupchat = GroupChat(agents=[researcher, writer, editor, fact_checker],
                     messages=[], max_round=20)

# Register Vex message hook
manager = GroupChatManager(groupchat=groupchat, llm_config={"model": "gpt-4"},
                          message_hook=vex_client.verify_message)

print('AG2 Content Group Ready')

implementation.title: Brand Voice Prompt Template
implementation.description: Configure Writer agent with brand-specific system prompt enforced by Vex
implementation.code:
BRAND_VOICE_TEMPLATE = """
You are {brand_name}, writing in {tone} tone. Key guidelines:
- Voice: {voice_description}
- Length: {word_count} words
- Structure: {structure_rules}
- Keywords: {seo_keywords}

Always maintain brand consistency. Never use competitor names.
"""

writer_system_message = BRAND_VOICE_TEMPLATE.format(
    brand_name="TechCorp",
    tone="professional yet approachable",
    voice_description="Use active voice, short sentences, tech metaphors",
    word_count="800-1000",
    structure_rules="H1 intro, 3 H2 sections, bullet points, conclusion",
    seo_keywords="AI automation, workflow optimization, productivity"
)

writer.update_system_message(writer_system_message)

# Vex will verify adherence to this template
vex_client.register_verification("brand_voice", 
                                template=BRAND_VOICE_TEMPLATE)

implementation.title: Initiate Content Generation Workflow
implementation.description: Start group chat with topic and trigger Vex verification pipeline
implementation.code:
topic = "How AI Agents Transform Content Creation"

# Vex pre-flight check
topic_verification = vex_client.verify({
    "type": "topic_relevance",
    "content": topic,
    "brand_guidelines": "technology, business, AI"
})

if topic_verification["approved"]:
    # Initiate group chat
    manager.initiate_chat(
        None,
        message=f"""Generate comprehensive article on: {topic}
        
        Requirements:
        - 1000 words
        - SEO keywords: AI agents, content automation
        - Brand voice: professional tech
        - Include 3 case studies
        - Cite 5+ credible sources"""
    )
else:
    print("Topic rejected by Vex guardrails")

implementation.title: Extract Final Verified Content
implementation.description: Retrieve and validate final article after group consensus
